chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-487 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 26.09.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner and no intimation has been received. This petition has been filed in the year 2023 challenging the transfer and posting orders issued by the School Education & Literacy Department, Government of Sindh. Lastly this petition was fixed on 27.04.2023, since then no effort has been made by learned counsel for the petitioner, which shows lack of interest on the part of petitioner, therefore the instant petition is hereby dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
